text:
SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part2-6th:ThanksAT is the 15th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of [[ShingekiNoKyojin|SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part2-2nd:ShingekiNoKyojin]].

All occurrences

Episode 55 - Levi finally chooses Armin
Episode 80 - In a flashback, Historia learns about the Founder Ymir
Special 1 and Episode 89 - Annie prepares to depart

Navigation
